active.notes: Base lexicon generated from owner-approved AOSP PinyinIME rawdict plus mozillazg pinyin-data single-character readings and first-party common lü-word supplements; bigram data remains first-party starter data.

entries.source: Android Open Source Project PinyinIME rawdict_utf16_65105_freq.txt, supplemented with mozillazg pinyin-data pinyin.txt for single-character reading coverage and first-party common lü-word entries
entries.license: Apache-2.0 for AOSP rawdict; MIT for pinyin-data; project-internal first-party supplemental entries
entries.transformation: tools/lexicon_builder build-base --format aosp-rawdict --frequency-scale 1 --default-frequency 25 --supplemental-pinyin-data pinyin.txt --release-approved; then add project-maintainer common lü-word supplements

entries.source: first-party starter bigram list written/generated by project maintainers; not derived from third-party lexicons
handwritten by project maintainers for development; not derived from third-party lexicons
